sigWerErrors.reason: 'benim' (my) is an extra word that changes the subject and meaning of the sentence, making it less coherent with the expected transcription.
'kodluyorum' (I am coding) and 'diyorum' (I am saying) are completely different verbs, which changes the meaning of the sentence.
In a spelled-out proper noun (arslan vs arclan), a single letter difference is a minor error as the name is still somewhat recognizable.
'at' and 'et' are phonetically similar in Turkish and both refer to the '@' symbol, so this is a minor error.
